name: Spaghettini Aglio-Oglio
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp + 1 t extra virgin olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling water, cook pasta for 10-12 minutes, until tender. Drain and place in a serving bowl.
2. Meanwhile, place a small non-stick skillet over medium heat for 30 seconds. Add oil; heat for an additional 30 seconds. Add garlic; cook, stirring constantly, until pale gold (do not brown), about 1 minute. Immediately stir in broth. Bring to a boil, stirring gently; reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until liquid is reduced by two-thirds and mixture is thickened, 3-4 minutes. Drizzle over cooked pasta, sprinkle with parsley and toss to coat.
